data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal x2: 12/11 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 12/15 (Fri) 6:59 PM (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard x2: 12/15 (Fri) 7:00 PM – 12/18 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
